# ipzilon_landing_zones (Data Source)

List landing zones. Provide id (singular) OR hub_id with optional parent_id/root_only filter.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all root landing zones in a hub
data "ipzilon_landing_zones" "roots" {
  hub_id    = 1
  root_only = true
}

# List child landing zones of a specific parent
data "ipzilon_landing_zones" "children" {
  hub_id    = 1
  parent_id = data.ipzilon_landing_zones.roots.items[0].id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `hub_id` (Number) List landing zones for this hub.
- `id` (Number) Lookup a single landing zone by ID.
- `parent_id` (Number) Filter by parent landing zone ID.
- `root_only` (Boolean) When true, return only root-level landing zones (parent_id IS NULL).

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `cidr` (String) CIDR block assigned to this landing zone.
- `description` (String) Free-text description.
- `hub_id` (Number)
- `id` (Number)
- `name` (String) Landing zone name.
- `parent_id` (Number)
